tasks.title: Design the user interface for the dashboard
tasks.description: Create wireframe and mockups for the task management dashboard.

tasks.title: Implement the backend API
tasks.description: Develop RESTful endpoints for task management operations.

tasks.title: Set up the database schema
tasks.description: Design and create the database schema for storing tasks and user information.

tasks.title: Write unit tests for the API
tasks.description: Create unit tests to ensure the API endpoints work as expected.

tasks.title: Integrate frontend with backend
tasks.description: Connect the React frontend with the backend API to enable task management functionality.

tasks.title: Conduct user testing
tasks.description: Gather feedback from users to identify any usability issues and improve the dashboard.

tasks.title: Deploy the application
tasks.description: Set up hosting and deploy the task management dashboard for public access.

tasks.title: Create documentation
tasks.description: Write comprehensive documentation for the application, including setup instructions and API usage.

tasks.title: Implement authentication
tasks.description: Add user authentication to secure access to the dashboard.

tasks.title: Optimize performance
tasks.description: Identify and fix performance bottlenecks in the application.
